failures.reason: juxtaposition - "OpenClaw's real pitch isn't privacy. It's control."
attempts: OpenClaw's real pitch isn't privacy. It's control. Running agents on hardware you own means the API costs stop when you stop. That's the thing cloud-hosted AI can't match.

failures.reason: juxtaposition - "The real operator tooling market isn't dashboards. It's the invisible stuff."
attempts: The real operator tooling market isn't dashboards. It's the invisible stuff: trace visualization, latency attribution, and context injection when an agent veers off-script.
